content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify atom C:7 (carbon with index 7) and its neighboring atoms. Let me analyze the connections:

Atom C:7 is connected to:
- C:6 (carbon with index 6) - to the left
- N:8 (nitrogen with index 8) - to the right  
- H:28 (hydrogen with index 28) - below

These are the three atoms covalently bonded to C:7.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file name "geomconf_6034.xyz", the geomconf_index for this molecule is 6034.

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 7 (C) are:
- Atom index 6, element C
- Atom index 8, element N  
- Atom index 28, element H

Geomconf_index: 6034

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
